channel.title: Trading852
channel.description: Independent English-language research on HKEX-listed companies. Special situations, documented NAV discounts, identifiable catalysts.

item.title: Alibaba (9988.HK): EBITA Down 57%. Cloud Up 36%. This Is What Amazon Looked Like in 2014.
item.description: Alibaba's adjusted EBITA fell 57% in Q3 FY2026. Cloud grew 36%. At HK$122.90, EV/EBIT is 10.8x while Tencent trades at 15x and Amazon at 35x. The EBITA drop is deliberate.

item.title: Yadea (1585.HK): Profit +129%. EV/EBIT 6.1x. The Market Sees a Bicycle Company.
item.description: Yadea's net profit grew +129% in FY2025. EV/EBIT is 6.1x against a peer range of 10-13x. The market's largest electric two-wheeler maker trades at roughly half its peer multiple.

item.title: Jacobio Pharmaceuticals (1167.HK): AstraZeneca Paid US$100M for One Molecule. The Rest Trades at US$507M.
item.description: AstraZeneca paid US$100M for one Jacobio molecule still in Phase I. The entire company trades at US$730M. Subtract net cash, the market values the rest at US$507M.

item.title: Prada (1913.HK): EPS Down 74%. Revenue Up 9%. One of These Numbers Is a Distraction.
item.description: Prada reported a -74% EPS miss in February 2026. The business grew 9%. At HKD 38.40, EV/EBIT is 9.2x against luxury peers at 15-30x.

item.title: Dickson Concepts (0113.HK): The Market Is Paying You HKD 375 Million to Buy This Company
item.description: Dickson Concepts holds HKD 2,729M in net cash against a HKD 2,354M market cap. A negative EV special situation with an asymmetric payoff.

item.title: Six Bounces. One Break. Now the Retest.
item.description: The Hang Seng's 35-year trendline held six times. The seventh touch broke it. Now price is retesting the line from below.
